notes: 8x8 overview for JB-based concierge MRI serving SG + MY patients. Segments span affluence x geography x motivation. Needs mix price, technology tier, convenience, clinical depth.

us_scores_rationale.Price accessibility (vs SG): ~40% cheaper than SG — RM4.5-6.8K (~S$1.3-1.9K) vs S$4-8K in SG
us_scores_rationale.MRI scanner tech (3T+): 3T scanner with modern AI-reconstruction — matches SG mid-tier, below SG flagship 3T with contrast specialists
us_scores_rationale.Whole-body package breadth: Head-to-toe single-session scan — most SG clinics quote modular; AEVUM packages as one
us_scores_rationale.Concierge experience: Private lounge + SG-border transport + single-session flow — unmatched in JB
us_scores_rationale.Cross-border convenience: 60-min drive from SG + packaged transport — much easier than flying Bangkok
us_scores_rationale.Clinician consultation depth: Follow-up tele-consult included; will need SG-registered doc partnership for SG patients
us_scores_rationale.Insurance / corporate linkage: Early — not yet in SG insurer networks; this is a known gap

segments.label: JB Malaysian professional
segments.note: MY citizen, local resident, higher income
